# SpraxAPI

> Free public REST API for Minecraft data: player profiles, UUIDs, skin renders,
> capes, server pings and Mojang server-blocklist tracking. No API key, no
> signup — plain HTTPS GET requests against https://api.sprax.dev/. You MUST
> send a descriptive User-Agent.

* v2 endpoints (`/mc/v2/...`) are current; v1 (`/mc/v1/...`) is kept for
  compatibility and is still the official way to access skin renders and capes.
* Data responses are JSON, renders are usually PNG (see the OpenAPI spec for
  details); errors are JSON with an `error` field.

## API

* [OpenAPI spec (JSON)](https://api.sprax.dev/openapi.json): machine-readable description of every endpoint
* [OpenAPI spec (YAML)](https://api.sprax.dev/openapi.yaml)
* [Interactive reference](https://api.sprax.dev/docs): human documentation with try-it console
* [API catalog](https://api.sprax.dev/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 linkset

## Status

* [Status (JSON)](https://api.sprax.dev/status)
* [Status page](https://status.sprax.dev/)

## Optional

* [Source code](https://github.com/SpraxDev/api.sprax.dev): GPL-3.0-or-later
* [Support Discord](https://sprax.me/discord)
